parameters.query:
SELECT 
  ps.url,
  ps.title,
  p.name as product_name,
  p.category,
  p.brand
FROM page_seo ps
LEFT JOIN products p ON ps.url LIKE '%' || p.slug || '%'
WHERE ps.lang = 'ru'
  AND ps.url LIKE '%/t/%'
  AND length(coalesce(ps.title,'')) > 0
  AND (ps.description IS NULL OR length(ps.description) = 0)
ORDER BY ps.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20
